evidence: Prognostic in clear-cell RCC, gastric and lung adenocarcinoma (high expression = worse outcome). Not MPM-specific.
Pan-cancer poor-prognosis proliferation marker (meta-analysis); part of an MPM fibroblast-differentiation survival signature.
Prognostic proliferation TF; interacts with CDC20; in an MPM fibroblast-differentiation survival-prediction network.
